posts.text_html: One of the cooler features of my new #11ty site is the ability to just have everything be controlled with Obsidian + YAML (and a simple/handy github push Obsidian extension I whipped together).

My new home on the web. A post will be coming at some point explaining the move and the reasons why, but really happy with my new 11ty backend site.

hunsanger.me

posts.text_html:
Early days, but I took @viticci@mastodon.social ’s excellent REMCTL work and input it into my a vibe-coded weekend project to make an updated Things-esque app for Reminders.

Not fully functional yet, but neat to get sub-sections working as well as proper tagging.
posts.text:
Early days, but I took @viticci@mastodon.social ’s excellent REMCTL work and input it into my a vibe-coded weekend project to make an updated Things-esque app for Reminders.

Not fully functional yet, but neat to get sub-sections working as well as proper tagging.

posts.text_html: I got access to RStudio's AI enhanced beta, and oh my is it nice... Much number crunching to be had here, and way easier then copy/pasting between Claude Code/Codex and RStudio.
posts.text: I got access to RStudio's AI enhanced beta, and oh my is it nice... Much number crunching to be had here, and way easier then copy/pasting between Claude Code/Codex and RStudio.

posts.text_html:
I took the excellent work by @josephjefe.bsky.social and did some customizations to come up with some additional data points (PFF Snaps and rating data) to evaluate salary cap info, and hosted my first Shiny app which allows anyone to run this for all 32 teams.

hunsanger.shinyapps.io/shiny/
posts.text:
I took the excellent work by @josephjefe.bsky.social  and did some customizations to come up with some additional data points (PFF Snaps and rating data) to evaluate salary cap info, and hosted my first Shiny app which allows anyone to run this for all 32 teams. 

hunsanger.shinyapps.io/shiny/
